title: Neural Credit Risk Engine
problem: A regional lending institution was processing over 2,400 loan applications monthly using a legacy rule-based system with a 34% false-positive rate on defaults. Manual underwriting consumed 18+ hours per application, limiting growth and creating inconsistent credit decisions.
solution: We engineered a multi-layer neural credit risk model trained on 7 years of proprietary transaction data, behavioral signals, and alternative data sources including rent payment history and utility records. The system delivers real-time risk scores with interpretable AI explanations (SHAP values) for regulatory compliance, integrated into their existing loan origination workflow.

outcomes.description: Up from 61% with the legacy rule-based system
Down from 18+ hours for full underwriting decision
Annualized reduction in net charge-offs
Increase in monthly application throughput

testimonial.name: Sarah Chen
testimonial.quote: Ivy League Solutions delivered a credit risk system that our regulators actually praised. The interpretability layer was a game changer — we can now explain every decision to examiners with confidence.

title: Predictive Readmission Intelligence Platform
problem: A 12-hospital network faced $23M annually in CMS readmission penalties, with 30-day readmission rates 4.2 points above the national average. Care coordinators had no systematic way to identify high-risk patients before discharge.
solution: We built a HIPAA-compliant predictive platform that ingests real-time EHR data via HL7 FHIR APIs, social determinants of health (SDOH) data, and claims history to generate patient-specific readmission risk scores 48–72 hours before discharge. The platform surfaces intervention recommendations and automates care plan assignments.

outcomes.description: 30-day all-cause readmissions across the network
Annual savings from reduced readmission penalties
More patients managed per coordinator per day
Precision at top 20% risk score threshold

testimonial.name: Dr. Marcus Reid
testimonial.quote: The SDOH integration was something no other vendor offered. We're now intervening on the right patients at the right time, and our quality scores reflect it.

title: Real-Time Transaction Fraud Detection
problem: A payment processing startup handling $850M in monthly transaction volume was losing $4.2M monthly to sophisticated fraud rings that easily bypassed traditional rule-based systems. Alert fatigue had analysts reviewing 1,200+ false positives daily.
solution: We deployed a graph neural network that maps transaction networks and identifies coordinated fraud patterns invisible to point-in-time models. Running on Apache Kafka with sub-50ms latency requirements, the system scores every transaction in real-time and uses adaptive feedback loops to evolve with new fraud patterns.

outcomes.description: Recall on fraud transactions vs 72% baseline
Analyst alert volume reduced from 1,200 to 190/day
Annualized fraud loss prevention
P99 end-to-end transaction scoring latency

title: Ambient Clinical Intelligence Platform
problem: Physicians at a 220-provider medical group were spending 38% of their workday on documentation, contributing to severe burnout. Clinical notes averaged 90 minutes per provider per day, with 23% error rates in ICD coding.
solution: We built an ambient clinical intelligence system that uses fine-tuned medical speech recognition and a domain-specific LLM to listen to patient encounters, generate structured clinical notes in real-time, suggest ICD-10/CPT codes, and push completed documentation to the EHR — requiring only physician review and approval.

outcomes.description: Per-provider daily documentation reduction
ICD-10 coding precision vs 77% manual baseline
Net Promoter Score improvement post-deployment
Annual revenue from improved coding capture

title: Personalized Wealth Intelligence Advisor
problem: A registered investment advisor with $2.1B AUM was struggling to provide personalized investment insights at scale. Advisors serviced 180+ clients each, making meaningful personalization impossible. Client retention was below industry average at 82%.
solution: We developed an AI-powered wealth intelligence platform that synthesizes portfolio data, market signals, tax situations, and life events to generate hyper-personalized investment narratives and proactive recommendations for each client. Advisors receive AI-drafted communications they can review and send in seconds.

outcomes.description: Up from 82% — above industry average
More clients per advisor without quality loss
Net new assets in first year post-deployment
Increase in client-initiated portfolio reviews

title: AI-Accelerated Drug Candidate Screening
problem: A biotech startup was spending $2.8M per compound in early-stage screening, with 94% of candidates failing in pre-clinical phases. Their pipeline for a rare cardiovascular target had stalled with only 8 viable candidates after 3 years.
solution: We built a molecular property prediction system using graph neural networks trained on 14M+ compound-assay pairs from public and proprietary datasets. The system predicts ADMET properties, target binding affinity, and toxicity flags — reducing wet lab screening from 2,000 candidates to the top 40 most promising.

outcomes.description: Per-compound early screening cost
Candidate selection vs traditional screening
Viable candidates per 1,000 compounds screened
Advanced to IND-enabling studies within 14 months
